title: Zoflora Springtime Multipurpose Disinfectant Trigger Spray, 1 x 800ml, Antibacterial Multi-Surface Cleaner, Pet-Safe, Kills 99.9% of Bacteria & Viruses
features: BURSTING WITH FRAGRANCE: Bring the refreshing fragrance of freshly cut green leaves with the blossoming of new spring flowers into your home

KILLS 99.9 PERCENT OF VIRUSES & BACTERIA: Zoflora’s disinfectant spray cleaner kills bacteria and viruses, helping to protect your family from potentially harmful germs, whilst also eliminating odours to leave homes beautifully fragrant all day

CUTS THROUGH GREASE & GRIME: Zoflora's disinfectant cleaning spray features a powerful formula that efficiently tackles grease and grime, offering a strong and versatile solution for cleaning a wide range of surfaces in your home

MULTI-SURFACE CLEANING: The convenient, ready-to-use disinfectant spray offers powerful antibacterial and antiviral protection, making it the perfect choice for maintaining cleanliness in high-traffic areas; its versatile formula is ideal for tackling everyday messes and providing quick clean-ups throughout your home, ensuring a safe and hygienic environment

PATENTED TECHNOLOGY: Zoflora contains patented odour elimination technology, and our fragrances are tested to last at least 24 hours, leaving your home beautifully fragrant; our fragrances are crafted by expert perfumers with premium ingredients to bring luxurious scents to your home
ALSO AVAILABLE IN: Explore a variety of perfumer-developed fragrances including Linen Fresh, Midnight Blooms, Lemon Zing, Springtime, Mountain Air, Sunshine Escape all available in 800ml

DIRECTIONS: Spray surfaces and wipe over with a clean damp cloth or sponge; for stubborn stains and grease, spray and leave for 2 minutes before wiping; to kill 99.9 Percent of viruses and bacteria, allow product to remain in contact with surfaces for 5 minutes before wiping away

EXPLORE THE ZOFLORA RANGE: Discover a diverse selection of captivating fragrances and specialized formulations within the Zoflora range, offering an array of choices to suit your cleaning needs; from bathroom cleaners that provide effective and hygienic cleaning to floor wipes that maintain cleanliness and freshness, and multi-purpose sprays that offer versatile cleaning solutions
description: Product Description Zoflora’s disinfectant spray cleaner is a powerful, versatile solution designed to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria, helping to protect your family from harmful germs while eliminating odors to leave your home beautifully fragrant all day. Its robust formula cuts through grease and grime tackling everyday messes and providing quick clean-ups in high-traffic areas. Zoflora’s disinfectant spray cleaner is for multi-surface cleaning, this ready-to-use disinfectant spray offers antibacterial and antiviral protection, ensuring a hygienic environment in your kitchen, bathroom, and other frequently used spaces. Zoflora’s patented odor elimination technology ensures that its luxurious fragrances, developed by expert perfumers, last for up to 24 hours. The fragrances are crafted from premium ingredients, filling your home with indulgent, long-lasting scents like Linen Fresh, Midnight Blooms, Lemon Zing, Springtime, Mountain Air, and Sunshine Escape, available in convenient 800ml bottles. To use, simply spray surfaces and wipe clean with a damp cloth or sponge. For tough stains and grease, spray and leave the solution for two minutes before wiping away. For maximum disinfecting power, leave the product on surfaces for five minutes to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria. Zoflora offers a range of products designed to maintain cleanliness and provide lasting freshness throughout your home, from bathroom cleaners to floor wipes and multi-purpose sprays. Whether you're tackling everyday messes or providing an extra layer of protection in high-traffic areas, Zoflora’s disinfectant spray cleaner offers an efficient, powerful cleaning solution that not only sanitizes but also fills your home with a delightful fragrance. Explore the full Zoflora range and discover products to meet your cleaning needs, ensuring a hygienic, fresh, and beautifully scented home every day. Ingredients Per 100g Zoflora contains 0.1g Benzalkonium Chloride, <5% Non-ionic surfactants and concentrated perfume compound. Manufacturer Contact Information Thornton & Ross Ltd., Huddersfield, HD7 5QH, UK. See more
